catalyst.event: 2026 H1 报告 disclosure of regional segment gross margins, overseas revenue YoY, and consolidated GM — first official test of whether overseas mix-shift is offsetting domestic price-war pressure
catalyst.source: Standard A-share H1 reporting window; WATCHLIST thresholds (revenue_growth, gross_margin) explicitly named in FULL DATA CONTEXT; broker reports (中信证券 2026-05-11, 华创证券 2026-05-07) all flag H1 as the validation event

rightIf_conditions: 2026 H1 overseas segment gross margin ≥ 18.0% @ 2026 H1 报告 2026-08-31 | source: 2026 H1 报告 分部信息披露: 海外/境外 营业收入与营业成本 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
2026 H1 consolidated gross margin ≥ 17.0% @ 2026 H1 报告 2026-08-31 | source: 2026 H1 报告 合并利润表: 营业收入与营业成本 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
2026 H1 overseas revenue YoY ≥ +35% @ 2026 H1 报告 2026-08-31 | source: 2026 H1 报告 分部信息披露: 境外 营业收入 vs 2025 H1 同口径 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
2026 H1 net profit YoY ≥ +5% @ 2026 H1 报告 2026-08-31 | source: 2026 H1 报告 合并利润表: 归母净利润 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
wrongIf_conditions: 2026 H1 overseas segment gross margin ≤ 16.5% @ 2026 H1 报告 2026-08-31 | source: 2026 H1 报告 分部信息披露: 海外/境外 营业收入与营业成本 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
2026 H1 consolidated gross margin ≤ 15.0% @ 2026 H1 报告 2026-08-31 | source: 2026 H1 报告 合并利润表: 营业收入与营业成本 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
2026 H1 net profit YoY ≤ -40% @ 2026 H1 报告 2026-08-31 | source: 2026 H1 报告 合并利润表: 归母净利润 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
2026 H1 revenue YoY ≤ -10% @ 2026 H1 报告 2026-08-31 | source: 2026 H1 报告 合并利润表: 营业收入 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
what_changes_our_mind: 2026 H1 报告 discloses overseas segment GM < 17% (collapsing the +280bps premium toward zero) OR consolidated GM < 16% — either would invalidate the mix-shift accretion mechanism.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes overseas-growth narrative is crowded and tariff-exposed at trough multiples → We believe segment-disclosed +280bps overseas GM premium will continue lifting consolidated GM in H1 2026 as mix shifts past 40% overseas → Mechanism is structurally measured FY2025 regional GM differential persisting through the localization transition (Euronews 2026-05-15 plant talks read as tariff hedge, not margin dilution).

quantification.predicted_value: Fwd P/E 20-22x as H1 confirms GM stability; consolidated GM 17.5-18.0%

tradeable_not_proven_statement: Tradeable, but not proven. Historical base is [E1:direct] (2025 Overseas GM 19.46% vs Domestic GM 16.66%, +280bps, SEGMENT ECONOMICS period 20251231); forward persistence is [E2:proxy] (H1 2026 mix-shift margin-accretion through European localization not yet measured); size capped until 2026 H1 报告 segment disclosure confirms overseas GM holds ≥18% and consolidated GM holds ≥17%.

core_causal_link.link_sentence: The FY2025 segment-disclosed +280bps overseas-vs-domestic GM premium persists into H1 2026 despite ramping European localization capex.
core_causal_link.tier_justification: The HISTORICAL BASE is [E1:direct] — SEGMENT ECONOMICS period 20251231 shows true_gm overseas 19.46% vs domestic 16.66%, isolable not proxy. The FORWARD claim that this persists into H1 2026 is honestly [E2:proxy] — it has not yet printed. To become [E1] requires the 2026 H1 报告 分部信息披露 to disclose overseas segment GM ≥ 18% with disclosed bz_sales and bz_cost (not blended PROXY).
